compressed_prompt: Write a letter to a friend in all lowercase letters ask them to go and vote.
response:
hey [friend's name],

i hope you're doing well! i just wanted to remind you that election day is coming up soon, and i really think it’s important for us to go out and vote. every vote counts, and it’s our chance to have a say in what happens in our community and country.

i know life gets busy, but it won’t take long—just a little time to make a big difference. if you’re not sure where to go, i can help you find your polling place or even go together if you want!

let me know if you’re in—it’d mean a lot to me. hope to see you at the polls!

take care,
[your name]
